parts.text: Generate a weekly review covering deen, family, work, health, and planning.

**Weekly Review – Sunday, March 15, 2026** *Period: Mar 9 – Mar 15, 2026* --- ## 📿 Deen | Metric | Result | Notes / Guidance | |--------|--------|------------------| | **Prayer Accuracy** | **10 / 35** (28.57 %) on‑time | • Late = 0, Missed = 0, Unknown = 25, Retroactive = 0
• **Action:** Implement a 10‑minute pre‑adhan prep routine (wudu, quiet space, intention) to boost on‑time consistency.
• **Action:** Log each prayer immediately after completion (use a reaction or quick note) to reduce “unknown” entries. | | **Retroactive Logs** | 0 | Good – no need to back‑fill missed entries. | | **Quran** | **30 pages** total read (≈ 0.5 Juz) | Max juz reached = 0.
• **Ramadan focus:** Set a daily target (e.g., 1 page after Fajr + 1 page after Maghrib) to steadily increase juz completion. | | **Tahajjud** | **5 / 4** nights (exceeded target) | Excellent night‑worship consistency; maintain or slightly increase duration/quality. | | **Adhkar** | Morning = 0, Evening = 0 | Currently unattached to any anchor.
• **Action:** Pair morning adhkar with post‑Fajr routine and evening adhkar with post‑Maghrib routine (e.g., 2‑minute dhikr after each salah). | | **Ramadan Mode** | **ON** | Prioritize punctual salah, daily Quran goal, and consistent night worship (Tahajjud + adhkar). | **Deen Wins:** - Tahajjud exceeded the weekly target. - Zero late or missed prayers – shows strong intention when logged. **Deen Gaps:** - Low on‑time prayer rate (mainly due to unknown logs). - No adhkar recorded. --- ## 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family *No
